scripts.build: npm run build -w @agorase/shared && npm run build -w @agorase/api && npm run build -w @agorase/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @agorase/shared && npm run build -w @agorase/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @agorase/shared && npm run build -w @agorase/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agorase/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agorase/api && npm run typecheck -w @agorase/web
